_comment: Evergreen day 1 — How a bill becomes law in Canada. Process explainer, non-time-sensitive.
matchSubstring: How a federal bill becomes law in Canada
text:
How a federal bill becomes law in Canada, every stage:

→ 1st reading (introduction, no debate)
→ 2nd reading (debate the principle)
→ Committee (clause-by-clause, public testimony, amendments)
→ Report stage
→ 3rd reading
→ Other chamber
→ Royal Assent → proclamation
